rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VERLIS BROWN SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Rodney D. Smith's Motion for Attorney Fees is continued to February 13, 2014 at 2:30 p.m. Moving party to serve notice of the motion and all supporting and reply papers on Lionel Taylor and Kenneth Taylor. All parties who have not previously served a copy of their responsive papers for the motion shall serve a copy of their papers on Lionel Taylor and Kenneth Taylor. [The Court also notes that notice of the pending Petition to Approve Stipulation for Settlement shall be served on all parties including Lionel Taylor and Kenneth Taylor. At the 1/28/14 Status Conference, Administrator should be prepared to address whether a Petition to Determine Entitlement needs to be filed.]
